title: Re ordering Automation

posts.author: Sameer.Ruhomaun (Sameer Ruhomaun)
posts.cookedHtml:
I would like to be able to sort my automation.

Currently I have several automation in one board which triggers in an order.
When I make a change to an automation, it send it up to the top and it is very difficult to view the flow of automation then.

Sorting them will help visualize what is happening and remove errors when doing automations in sequences.

posts.author: trafitom (Tomas Trafina)
posts.cookedHtml: Totally agree. Moreover, sometimes, when we create board from our template the automations get reordered randomly creating a complete nonsense mess which is not readable, and configurable easily.
